instruction: Add a small pink dot to the device phone mobile icon in the bottom-right (circle cx=112, cy=112, r=2, fill #ec4899).
initial_svg:
<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 128 128" width="128" height="128">
<rect id="__bg" x="0" y="0" width="128" height="128" fill="white" />
  <g id="icon" data-source="heroicons/outline/device-phone-mobile.svg" transform="translate(8, 8) scale(4.6667)" style="color: #222" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.5"><path stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" d="M10.5 1.5H8.25A2.25 2.25 0 0 0 6 3.75v16.5a2.25 2.25 0 0 0 2.25 2.25h7.5A2.25 2.25 0 0 0 18 20.25V3.75a2.25 2.25 0 0 0-2.25-2.25H13.5m-3 0V3h3V1.5m-3 0h3m-3 18.75h3"/></g>
</svg>
target_svg:
<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 128 128" width="128" height="128">

  <circle id="dot" fill="#ec4899" cx="112" cy="112" r="2" />
</svg>
